task.objective: Research and plan comprehensive improvements for dashboard data consistency and filter behavior across ALL pages
task.background:
The dashboard has two critical issues requiring unified resolution:
ISSUE 1: Filter Behavior Inconsistency - Pages affected: /dashboard/reliability, /dashboard/performance, main dashboard (/) - Current: Filters exist but data always shows aggregated results regardless of filter state - Target: Filter selection should change data scope (last run vs all runs)
ISSUE 2: Chart Data Consistency Problem - Example from main dashboard showing incorrect visualization: * Total: 23 tests * Top bar: 22 passed (96%), 0 failed (0%), 12 flaky (52%) * Donut chart: Passed 95.7%, Flaky 52.2% shown as pie slices * Problem: Percentages don't add to 100% because passed/flaky are OVERLAPPING categories - A test can be BOTH "passed" (in current execution) AND "flaky" (historically unreliable) - Pie charts imply mutually exclusive categories but the data is overlapping - This creates user confusion and misrepresents the data

success_criteria.criterion: Clear understanding of all affected pages and components
Identified all charts with overlapping category issues
Defined proper data representation for each chart type
Identified database queries that need modification
Created phase prompts for incremental implementation
All filter and chart requirements mapped to code changes

mandatory_requirements.requirement: No filter applied → Show ALL runs data (historical aggregate)
Filter applied (branch/suite) → Show LAST RUN data only for that filter
Add "Historic Summary" checkbox: - Only visible when branch OR suite is selected - UNCHECKED by default - When checked, shows ALL runs for selected filter
This logic applies to ALL components on ALL dashboard pages
Pie/donut charts MUST show mutually exclusive categories that add to 100%
Donut chart should show: Passed / Failed / Skipped (mutually exclusive)
Flaky indicator should be SEPARATE from the pie chart (badge, icon, or secondary metric)
All charts on a page MUST use the same filtered dataset - no discrepancies
Top summary bar and detailed charts MUST show consistent numbers
Update ALL documentation pages to reflect new behavior

constraints.constraint: Preserve existing API signatures where possible
Maintain backwards compatibility for MCP tools
Use existing shadcn components (Checkbox, Label, Badge)

step.name: Dashboard Page Inventory
step.action:
Identify ALL pages and components affected by these changes:
1. Main Dashboard (/): - StatusDistributionChart (donut) - CRITICAL: shows overlapping data - StatusSummaryBar (horizontal bar) - Stats cards (pass rate, failure rate, etc.) - FlakiestTestsCard - SlowestTestsCard
2. Reliability Page (/dashboard/reliability): - ReliabilityScoreCard - FlakiestTestsCard - Score Breakdown cards - Raw Metrics cards
3. Performance Page (/dashboard/performance): - PerformanceAlertsCard - SlowestTestsCard - FailureRateChart
4. Shared Components: - Filters component (needs "Historic Summary" checkbox) - Any shared chart components
For each component: - Document current data source - Note which props control filtering - Identify if it shows overlapping vs mutually exclusive data
step.output: Document in investigation/analysis.md: - Complete component list per page - Data flow diagram (simplified) - Chart type and data category analysis

step.name: Chart Data Analysis
step.action:
Analyze each chart for correct data representation:
1. StatusDistributionChart (donut): - Current: Shows passed + flaky as pie slices (WRONG) - Target: Show passed/failed/skipped only, flaky as separate indicator
2. StatusSummaryBar: - Verify it shows mutually exclusive categories - Check if flaky count is additive or overlapping
3. All other charts: - Identify data categories used - Check if categories are mutually exclusive - Document fixes needed
Key insight: - Test status (passed/failed/skipped) = mutually exclusive - Flaky flag = orthogonal attribute that can apply to any status
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - Chart-by-chart analysis - Current vs target data representation - Proposed visualization changes

step.name: Database Query Analysis
step.action:
Analyze database functions that need modification:
1. Read lib/db/performance.ts - getPerformanceRegressions 2. Read lib/db/metrics.ts - getReliabilityScore 3. Read lib/db/index.ts - getExecutions, getTestResults 4. Read other relevant queries in lib/db/
For each query: - Document current filtering behavior - Identify WHERE clause modifications for "lastRunOnly" - Determine how to properly separate passed/failed/flaky counts
Key insight: "last run" = most recent execution_id for filtered branch/suite
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - List of database functions to modify - SQL pattern for "last run only" filtering - Correct data aggregation patterns

step.name: Filter State Design
step.action:
Design "Historic Summary" toggle integration:
Option A: URL Query Parameter (RECOMMENDED) - Add ?historic=true to URL params - Pros: Shareable URLs, SSR friendly - Cons: URL gets longer
Option B: Client State Only - useState in Filters component - Pros: Cleaner URLs - Cons: Not shareable, resets on navigation
UI Design: - Checkbox appears inline with other filters - Only visible when branch OR suite is selected - Label: "Historic Summary" or "Show All Runs"
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - Chosen approach with rationale - Filters component modification plan - URL parameter name and behavior

step.name: API Endpoints Analysis
step.action:
Check API endpoints for needed updates:
1. /api/reliability-score - lastRunOnly support? 2. /api/executions - filtering support? 3. /api/metrics - proper data separation? 4. /api/mcp - MCP tools parameter updates 5. Any endpoint returning chart data
For each endpoint: - Check current parameter support - Document needed additions - Verify data returned is properly categorized
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - API endpoints requiring changes - New parameters to add - MCP tool compatibility notes

step.name: Documentation Audit
step.action:
Identify all documentation needing updates:
1. CLAUDE.md - Main project documentation 2. docs/MCP_INTEGRATION.md - MCP tools docs 3. docs/MODERN_DASHBOARD_FEATURES.md - Feature documentation 4. Any README files in relevant directories 5. In-page documentation (info cards on pages)
step.output: Add to investigation/analysis.md: - List of documentation files to update - Key sections requiring changes

step.name: Create Phase Prompts
step.action:
Break implementation into logical phases:
Phase 1: Chart Data Fixes - Fix StatusDistributionChart to show only passed/failed/skipped - Add separate flaky indicator (badge or secondary metric) - Ensure all charts use consistent data
Phase 2: Filter Component Update - Add "Historic Summary" checkbox to Filters - Only show when branch/suite selected - Add URL parameter support
Phase 3: Database Query Updates - Add lastRunOnly parameter to relevant queries - Implement "most recent execution" logic - Ensure proper data separation
Phase 4: Page Integration - Update all dashboard pages with new filter logic - Pass new params to all child components - Test behavior variations
Phase 5: Documentation & Testing - Update all identified documentation - Verify MCP tool compatibility - Final testing across all scenarios

output_deliverables.deliverable: investigation/analysis.md - Full analysis with component inventory, chart analysis, query analysis, and design decisions

scenario.data_shown: Last run only for selected branch
scenario.charts: Show data from most recent execution on that branch

scenario.data_shown: Last run only for selected suite
scenario.charts: Show data from most recent execution of that suite

scenario.data_shown: Last run only for selected branch+suite
scenario.charts: Show data from most recent matching execution

rule.name: donut_chart
rule.flaky_handling: Separate badge/indicator, NOT a pie slice

rule.name: summary_bar
rule.categories: Passed, Failed, Flaky (if shown as segment)
rule.note: If flaky is shown, clarify it's a subset/overlap indicator

rule.name: consistency
rule.rule: All charts on same page MUST use identical filtered dataset
Numbers in summary cards MUST match numbers in charts
Tooltips should clarify any overlapping categories

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results. This step is MANDATORY and must be executed after all other steps.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all investigation steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/overall-reliability-performance-improvements/status.md
with the following information: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: investigation/prompt.xml - Phase: Investigation - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Summary of findings - List of deliverables created - Next steps (link to first phase prompt) - Any blockers encountered

rules.rule: ALWAYS update status.md as the LAST action
Be specific about files created and decisions made
Link to phases/01_chart_data_fixes.xml as next step

mandatory_commit_step.description: Commit all changes with a structured message identifying feature and phase.
mandatory_commit_step.commit_format:
feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): investigation - {{BRIEF_DESCRIPTION}}
Example: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): investigation - Chart consistency and filter analysis complete
